title: Kinfe Invincible
description: It is a style of simple and interesting relaxation of the game, in the game like a real chef to cut vegetables, hold the screen to swing the kitchen knife, each level has different vegetables, complete the goal of the clearance can be. The game is a bit like fruit ninja, not too difficult, but still requires a lot of hand speed, the player has to do is to control the kitchen knife in the hand, the conveyor belt to upload all vegetables into thin slices, very decompression.
instructions: Although the vegetables in the screen will be transferred quickly there is no need to press the screen The game is a test of reaction in addition to the ingredients on the chopping board there will be obstacles if you cut wrong you will lose time
